name: The Quest For Everest
overview: Karl and Chris goon a 3 week trip, where they got to travel through China, Tibet & Nepal with the highlight of reaching Mount Everest base camp.  However, their plans fall apart with Chris being hospitalised with severe altitude sickness. Will they succeed with our quest for Everest?

trailers.title: The Quest For Everest: Everest Base Camp Trek, Nepal - Travel Documentary Trailer
